PushEvent:yasyf/captain-hook.summary: made evt.llm the in-handler LLM surface and moved packs onto public conditions

PushEvent:yasyf/cc-orchestrate.summary: migrated the orchestrator onto the daemon runtime with PTY incarnation nonces

PushEvent:yasyf/cc-pool.summary: made holder install transactional and resolved the canonical daemon executable

PushEvent:yasyf/cc-review.summary: reset the state layer and wired cc-review onto the cc-interact v1 runtime

PushEvent:yasyf/cc-squash.summary: hard-cut the control runtime onto daemonkit and reset formats to epoch one

PushEvent:yasyf/cc-steer.summary: made paired DeLong the default for comparative verdicts across both scorer arms

PushEvent:yasyf/cc-transcript.summary: swapped the shell parser to rable and added a recursive deep-view over sessions

PushEvent:yasyf/experiment-at-home.summary: added an engine-owned checkpoint subsystem with resumable runs

PushEvent:yasyf/spawnllm.summary: inverted the core so Python is a thin wasmtime host over spawnllm-core

authkit@v0.2.0.summary: pinned cookiesync trust by its shipped module-path codesign identifier

captain-hook@v12.9.0.summary: added evt.llm as the in-handler LLM surface with packs on the new helpers

cc-context@v0.29.0.summary: promoted the anchor package to the public API with ccx anchor hash/resolve

spawnllm@v0.10.0.summary: stripped provider API keys from the child env and added a claude-sdk backend
